discoveries: import must come BEFORE module docblock in Lean 4
INT16_MIN/MAX: use simp only [INT16_MIN, INT16_MAX] at * before omega for multi-const goals
abbrev is transparent to omega; simp-unfold first is safer for multi-constant proofs
prefix is reserved in Lean 4 — use pfx/sfx
CRC-32 is LSBIT-first (reflected): use >>> right-shift
CRC-64-WE is MSBIT-first: use <<< left-shift, check bit 63
FVSquad.lean AND Basic.lean must both import new files
Int.add_emod_right : (a + b) % b = a % b — direct periodicity lemma
wrap_bin bug: bin + n < 0 iff bin <= -n-1
by_contra unavailable without Mathlib 4.29; use by_cases + omega
simp only [if_pos h1, if_neg h2] for case-splitting on if-then-else
For radians/degrees proof: parameterise by p : Rat; round-trip by field_simp; ring
computeT3 proof: simp [max_def] + linarith covers all cases
AlphaFilter induction: use induction n generalizing state for state-updating recursion
total_T_ge_T123: rw [total_T_partition] then exact Int.le_max_left _ _
linarith cannot combine equalities with max; use rw to substitute the equality first
ring, nlinarith, linarith are MATHLIB ONLY — not available in standard Lean 4 stdlib
Int.mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right : a * c <= b * c when a <= b and 0 <= c (available stdlib)
simp only [def_name] beta-reduces let-bindings in goals (needed for pidOutputRaw)
rw [if_neg h]; no closing tactic needed when goal is already trivially closed by rw
simp handles mul_zero/zero_mul/add_zero for Int without explicit lemma names
For SensorOrientation injectivity: use exfalso + simp only [yawOffsetK, Option.some.injEq] at heq + omega (not simp_all which leaves non-integer goal)
yawOffsetK_zero_unique: simp_all [yawOffsetK] works — simp_all can close integer equality contradictions and SensorOrientation equality goals together
Coverage proofs: rcases hk with rfl | ... after simp [List.mem_cons, List.mem_nil_iff, or_false] — goals are in list order (left to right)
alphaUpdate_ge_sample (state alpha 0 hpos ha0 ha1): gives 0 ≤ alphaUpdate state alpha 0 when 0 ≤ state (use for lower-bound in fdConst)
alphaUpdate_le_sample (state alpha 0 hneg ha0 ha1): gives alphaUpdate state alpha 0 ≤ 0 when state ≤ 0
FDState needs deriving Repr to use #eval directly; use .1/.2 to extract fields
Rat.div_def + Rat.zero_mul proves 0/dt = 0 (Rat.zero_div not available)
notes: Run104: Target 47 (FilteredDerivative) done — 13 theorems, 0 sorry. Builds on AlphaFilter.lean. Next: target 46 (goldensection, MODERATE) or Task 1 for new targets.

PID.notes: Clamping, anti-windup, equilibrium, monotonicity. Int model abstracts float/NaN.

SensorOrientation.notes: yawOffsetK bijection on {-3,-2,-1,0,1,2,3,4}; bounds; injectivity; zero-uniqueness; coverage. All decidable by cases+omega.

target_46_goldensection.notes: MODERATE. Interval ordering invariant a<=c<=d<=b; shrinks by 1/phi. Needs rational phi approximation.

target_47_FilteredDerivative.notes: DONE. 13 theorems, 0 sorry. fdUpdate structural + fdConstAlphaIter convergence (bounded_pos, bounded_neg, shrinks, nonneg).
